title: Supplement to: A transcriptional map of human tonsil architecture
author: Crowell, Helena Lucia
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Napari inputs (slide S1)  
 
 single-molecule RNA "targets" 
 "images" of IF markers for  
 
 DAPI (nuclei) 
 PanCK (epithelia) 
 CD45* (immune) 
 PanMem (membrane) 
 
 
 "labels" annotating
 
 field of view (FOV) placement 
 cell segmentation boundaries 
 
 
 
 *CD68 was not measure for this slide.
